              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/area-boundary-table.tsx NEW — Client Component. Filter row: debounced (300ms) region text input + isEnabled tri-state select (all/enabled/disabled) + source tri-state select (all/official/custom). Cursor pagination matching users-page pattern (limit 50, "Load more" button when `nextCursor !== undefined`). Columns: Name, Region, Source badge (default for official, secondary for custom), Geometry Type, Enabled badge, Override Official badge (destructive for Yes, outline for No), Created By (creator.fullName from router include). Admin-only Actions column with `data-testid="row-action-edit"` (disabled stub, A.2 tooltip) + `data-testid="row-action-delete"` (functional — emits onDelete(boundary) upward).
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/delete-area-boundary-dialog.tsx NEW — Client Component. Confirmation copy includes boundary name in <strong> + fan-out warning ("fans out an area-rederive job for every Event, Patrol, and FuelEntry in this tenant ... 50/sec rate limiter"). useMutation onSuccess: invalidates `trpc.areaBoundary.list` + shows feedback with singular/plural copy ("X rederive job enqueued" / "X rederive jobs enqueued"). useMutation onError: shows server message verbatim. Success-state Close button uses `data-testid="delete-success-close"` to avoid collision with shadcn Dialog's sr-only Close (lesson logged 2026-05-24 in lessons.md).
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/__tests__/area-boundary-table.test.tsx NEW — 14 cases. Mocks `trpc.areaBoundary.list.useQuery` only (no next-auth mock needed — table receives `isAdmin` as prop). Covers: row rendering (name/region/badges/creator), role gating (operator no Actions column, admin Edit-disabled + Delete buttons), delete callback receives correct row, debounced region filter, isEnabled enabled/disabled passes through to query, source filter passes through, empty state, loading skeleton, Load more button visibility.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/__tests__/delete-area-boundary-dialog.test.tsx NEW — 11 cases. Mocks `trpc.areaBoundary.delete.useMutation` + `trpc.useUtils` via hoisted `stubs` with `nextOutcome` switch (success/error mid-render). Covers: boundary name in copy, Cancel onOpenChange(false), Confirm mutation payload, success plural copy + invalidate-on-success + Close→onSuccess flow, success singular copy when count===1, error message render, pending-state disables both buttons.
